title: Agent Pulse
description: Indicateur de statut d'agent IA avec halo pulsant. Idéal pour Hive monitoring : idle / thinking / running, chaque état a sa couleur et sa fréquence.

source.description: URL de la source : ws://, sse://, ou mock:pulse

agent-id.description: Identifiant de l'agent affiché sous le cercle

states.description: Mapping état → couleur CSS. Défaut : idle=#48bb78, thinking=#e11d48, running=#3b82f6

render.html:
idle
{{agent-id}}
render.css: .ct-pulse-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;padding:28px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10);border-radius:20px;backdrop-filter:blur(24px) saturate(150%);box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18),0 20px 60px -24px rgba(0,0,0,0.65);position:relative;width:160px;}.ct-pulse-core{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ct-pulse-color,#48bb78);box-shadow:0 0 16px var(--ct-pulse-color,#48bb78);transition:background 400ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.7,0.2,1),box-shadow 400ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.7,0.2,1);position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-60%);}.ct-pulse-ring{width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--ct-pulse-color,#48bb78);opacity:0.5;animation:ct-pulse-halo var(--ct-pulse-dur,1.4s) cubic-bezier(0.2,0.7,0.2,1) infinite;position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-60%);transition:border-color 400ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.7,0.2,1);}.ct-pulse-state{margin-top:52px;font-family:'Satoshi Variable',Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ct-pulse-color,#48bb78);transition:color 400ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.7,0.2,1);}.ct-pulse-label{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace;font-size:11px;color:rgba(245,245,245,0.48);letter-spacing:0.5px;}@keyframes ct-pulse-halo{0%{transform:translate(-50%,-60%) scale(1);opacity:0.5;}70%{transform:translate(-50%,-60%) scale(1.6);opacity:0;}100%{transform:translate(-50%,-60%) scale(1.6);opacity:0;}}
